resources.string: Every Tesla-visible conversation belongs to a channel. The channel ID is encoded in the fake phone number.
+888 X YYYYYYY\n │ └─── Mapping ID (7 digits)\n └───── Channel ID (1=LLM is V2-reserved)
Routes Tesla dictation replies via RemoteInput to the original messaging app (WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, …)
AI assistant (Grok): forwards Tesla dictations to xAI Grok and injects the answer as a fake SMS that the Tesla TTS reads aloud. Start a conversation via the home-screen button.
Internal channel reserve for pre-flight tests and diagnostic conversations
